a.xlink:title: Returns true if the Element is global.
Returns true if we need to go off-node for calling operations.
Returns number of data entries across all nodes.
Returns node number of specified dataIndex.
True if there is a copy of every dataEntry on all nodes.
This function is called from Shell when simulation is called to write the left-over data to streamer ...
Write to a output file in given format.
This function prepares data to be written to a file.
Write data to csv file. See the documentation of writeToOutfile for details.
Write to NPY format. See the documentation of writeToOutfile for more details.
